title: Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Gurgaon location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited!
